summary: Agent platform for engineering workflows across CAD, FEA, costing, and reporting tools.
editor_note: The interesting bet is that engineers do not need another copilot; they need a workbench where agents can operate CAD, FEA, cost, and reporting tools. Synera connects 80+ hardware-engineering systems with a node-based editor, 3D viewer, custom nodes, Python scripts, and token licensing. Unlike generic AI-for-manufacturing pitches, this starts from the messy CAx toolchain. The risk is that enterprise deployment turns the agents into services work.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Synera: Agent platform for engineering workflows across CAD, FEA, costing, and reporting tools.
Synera connects 80+ hardware-engineering systems with a node-based editor, 3D viewer, custom nodes, Python scripts, and token licensing.
